description_long: This apartment building is a mid-rise, rectangular structure with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a series of repeating balconies, each with railings, creating a rhythmic pattern across the building's width. The exterior is primarily light-colored, with beige and white tones, and vertical elements that break up the horizontal lines of the balconies. The rear side has a simpler design, with rows of windows and vertical columns, and lacks balconies. The building sits on a green base, suggesting landscaped surroundings, and the overall design is functional and modern, with minimal ornamentation. The structure appears to have multiple floors, each with regularly spaced windows and balcony access.
description: A modern, mid-rise apartment building with repeating balconies on the front facade, light-colored exterior, and a flat roof. The design is symmetrical and functional, with multiple floors and a landscaped base.
description_view_0: Front view showing a wide facade with multiple balconies and a rhythmic, symmetrical arrangement of railings and windows.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's depth, the flat roof, and the stacked arrangement of balconies along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with rows of windows and vertical columns, lacking balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the building's length and the vertical alignment of balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in evenly spaced, horizontal rows across each floor, with a symmetrical and repetitive pattern on both the front and rear facades.
